APPEARANCES - ATTY. RONALD D. ARENA OF THE ARENA HOFFMAN LLP, TEL. NO. 433-1062 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. N. WILLAIM METKE OF THE CRS LLP, TEL. NO. (650) 948-7200 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF MICHELLE YE'S Motion To quash Subpoena to Engel & Volkers is Granted as to categories 4-9, 21 and 23, but otherwise denied, except as to the record of Miss Yee submitting Mr. Paul Lobosco as a reference should also be produced. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
